October 2015 Lehigh Valley,
Products (NYSE:APD) will highlight company's latest technologies metals processing industry Heat Treat 2015 Conference Exhibition Detroit, Mich., from October 20-22. company will also share latest developments furnace case hardening steels heat treating trends part conference's technical program.
Metals processors invited stop Products booth speak with knowledgeable representative about their particular heat treating challenges. With over years heat treating experience, Products' applications engineers work with customers learn their specific annealing, brazing, hardening sintering process make help improve their overall operation.
Products' industrial gases available variety supply modes match each customer's requirements efficiently company also offers handling equipment technology, well process audits that help metals processors optimize use, lower operating costs, maximize uptime, increase throughput, improve product quality.
Zbigniew Zurecki, FASM senior research associate Products, will share developments atmosphere treatments part "New Directions Opportunities Heat Treating" panel session Wednesday morning, October addition, Products' Liang principal application engineer, will present results original research titled "Optimization Protective Atmospheres Annealing Hardening Operations Continuous Furnaces" during Atmosphere Technology Session Wednesday afternoon.
more information about Products' industrial gases equipment, technology solutions services metals processing industry, please call 800-654-4567, email visit
